description: Clinical Trial Management System, mixed compliance — audit trail enabled but reviewed annually rather than per risk-based schedule.

audit_trail_review.cadence: audit-trail review not performed in the past 12 months on the patient-randomization module

user_lifecycle.shared_accounts: none on production; one shared account on the validation environment for training purposes

change_control: every change recorded with reason; some changes batch-approved at end of week rather than at the time the change applies

data_integrity.test_data_in_production: DEV branch contains test data; PROD verified clean
data_integrity.uncontrolled_blank_template: blank CRF templates available on shared drive; uncontrolled
